picks.quote: I have Azim on the money line at the moment... I'm 100% convinced Azim's going to be way too much on the money line.
I like her a lot against Mary Spencer. Right now Desley Robinson's a dollar 50 58% return, man... I'm taking Desley on the money line.

Seiko Khetag is my dog of the week... I'm rolling with that South African energy. I think that Khetag is going to jump out to an early lead.
I don't think he's live, dude. Cason's 32 years old. He's never fought past the fifth round... I don't think Cason at +425 is live.
after watching tape, Fran Hennessy should win a points decision.
